title: clematis ochotensis f. fauriei
intro: Clematis ochotensis f. fauriei, also known as the East Asian Clematis, is a flowering plant species in the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its alkaloid and phenolic compounds. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relieving pain, reducing fever, and treating skin conditions, as well as having antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, Clematis ochotensis f. fauriei is often used as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and is also used in traditional East Asian medicine to support overall health and well-being.
